questionHtml:
The first eight successive ionization energies for an element are shown. In which group is the element?

Copyright Prof Mark Winter.

A.  6

B.  7

C.  8

D.  17

meta.title: The first eight successive ionization energies for an element are shown. In which group is the element? Copyright Prof Mark Winter. A. 6 B. 7 C. 8 D. 17
